articles.title: Arshdeep 'doesn't have the same juice as a few months back,' says Rayudu
articles.description: "He needs to back his skill set as well," Mark Boucher says after Arshdeep Singh conceded runs at 17.33 in Punjab Kings' win over Lucknow Super Giants

articles.title: Shreyas Iyer's maiden IPL ton keeps Punjab Kings in the hunt for playoffs spot
articles.description: The PBKS skipper helped break their six-match losing streak, as they sealed a chase of 200 against a depleted Lucknow Super Giants to breach the top four on the points table again

articles.title: Devine intervention brings New Zealand back from the dead
articles.description: Pitch-perfect 87 from veteran rescues team from turmoil at 11 for 4, to square series

articles.title: Kohli refuses to shake hands with Head after SRH vs RCB game
articles.description: Virat Kohli and Travis Head had exchanged words earlier during the game, in which SRH beat RCB by 55 runs

articles.title: SRH win big but RCB, GT seal top two spots
articles.description: Fifties from Kishan, Klaasen and Abhishek propelled SRH to a massive score, but RCB ensured their net run-rate stayed good enough to take them to Qualifier 1

articles.title: Vijay Shankar retires from Indian domestic cricket and the IPL
articles.description: The move will enable the 35-year-old allrounder to play in overseas franchise leagues

articles.title: Babar back for ODIs vs Australia; uncapped Rohail, Minhas and Daniyal called up
articles.description: Shadab Khan and Naseem Shah also returned for three-match series, while Mohammad Rizwan was omitted

articles.title: Bangladesh to tour Zimbabwe for all-format series in June-July
articles.description: Upcoming series will mark Zimbabwe's first home assignment this year, and their first international action since the T20 World Cup

articles.title: Exiled Afghanistan women to tour England during T20 World Cup
articles.description: Afghan Refugee Women's Team will start their tour on June 22

articles.title: Bumrah rested for Afghanistan Test; Rahul replaces Pant as vice-captain
articles.description: Rohit Sharma and Virat Kohli are in the ODI squad as India build towards the 2027 World Cup

articles.title: [WATCH] Actor Ram Charan apologises to Jasprit Bumrah after mistakenly calling him ‘footballer’
articles.description: During an interaction with the media, the actor was asked to describe some of India’s iconic cricketers in a few words.

articles.title: Jacob Bethell to return to UK after sustaining finger injury in IPL 2026
articles.description: Jacob Bethell missed the Royal Challengers Bengaluru's (RCB) last league game in the IPL after sustaining a finger injury.
